old_example: The gardener applied a mild insecticide to the roses to protect them from aphids and other pests.
new_example: The gardener applied a mild insecticide to the roses today.
new_translation: Người làm vườn đã phun một loại thuốc diệt côn trùng lên hoa hồng.

old_example: Carefully inserting the delicate components into the circuit board is a crucial step in the assembly process.
new_example: Carefully inserting the components into the circuit board is crucial.
new_translation: Việc chèn cẩn thận các linh kiện vào bảng mạch là quan trọng.

old_example: The client insisted on a full refund after discovering several defects in the delivered goods.
new_example: The client insisted on a full refund today.
new_translation: Khách hàng đã khăng khăng yêu cầu hoàn tiền toàn bộ hôm nay.

old_example: Qualified engineers will inspect the structural integrity of the bridge before it is reopened to traffic.
new_example: Qualified engineers will inspect the structural integrity of the bridge.
new_translation: Các kỹ sư có trình độ sẽ kiểm tra tính toàn vẹn của cây cầu.

old_example: All machinery in the factory is inspected regularly to ensure it meets safety standards.
new_example: All machinery in the factory is inspected regularly today.
new_translation: Tất cả máy móc trong nhà máy được kiểm tra thường xuyên hôm nay.

old_example: Inspecting the final products for quality assurance is a critical part of our manufacturing process.
new_example: Inspecting the final products for quality is critical today.
new_translation: Việc kiểm tra các sản phẩm cuối cùng để đảm bảo chất lượng là quan trọng.

old_example: The hotel underwent a rigorous health and safety inspection before receiving its five-star certification.
new_example: The hotel underwent a health and safety inspection today.
new_translation: Khách sạn đã trải qua một cuộc kiểm tra sức khỏe và an toàn.

old_example: Regular fire safety inspections are necessary to ensure that all emergency exits are clear and functional.
new_example: Regular fire safety inspections are necessary for the building.
new_translation: Các cuộc kiểm tra an toàn phòng cháy là cần thiết cho tòa nhà.

old_example: The building inspector found several structural issues that must be addressed before the project continues.
new_example: The building inspector found several structural issues today.
new_translation: Thanh tra viên tòa nhà đã tìm thấy một vài vấn đề cấu trúc.

old_example: The quality control manager inspects every batch of products before they are cleared for shipping.
new_example: The manager inspects every batch of products before shipping.
new_translation: Quản lý kiểm tra từng lô sản phẩm trước khi vận chuyển.

old_example: The speaker's inspirational life story deeply moved the audience and motivated many of them to pursue their own dreams.
new_example: The speaker's inspirational life story deeply moved the audience.
new_translation: Câu chuyện cuộc đời truyền cảm hứng của diễn giả làm khán giả xúc động.

old_example: The CEO's inspiring keynote speech motivated the entire team to work towards the company's new vision.
new_example: The CEO's inspiring speech motivated the entire team today.
new_translation: Bài diễn văn đầy cảm hứng của CEO đã thúc đẩy toàn đội ngũ.

old_example: The low interest rates offered by the bank have encouraged many families to buy their first homes.
new_example: The low interest rates have encouraged many families today.
new_translation: Mức lãi suất thấp đã khuyến khích nhiều gia đình hôm nay.
